name: ai-registry-core
description: AI Registry — central repository for schema, consolidation, and website

scripts.dev: LOCAL_VENDORS_DIR=.. npm run consolidate && rm -rf website/public/api website/public/schemas && mkdir -p website/public/api/v1 website/public/schemas && cp dist/api/v1/*.json website/public/api/v1/ && cp schemas/*.json website/public/schemas/ && cd website && npm run dev
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
